steps.title: Track the experiment over time
steps.content: The passage begins with Samuel Pierce burying bottles of seeds in 1879, then explains that researchers have continued periodic checks, including a 2021 retrieval. The main purpose is to describe a long-running experiment and its continuing findings.

steps.title: Reject purposes not in the text
steps.content:
• Choice B adds plant removal, which the passage never discusses.
  • Choice C says two experiments are compared, but only Pierce's experiment is described.
  • Choice D shifts to preservation difficulties, while the passage focuses on seed viability over time.
The answer is A.
